title: Phantom Garden (FIXTURE — not a real game)
edition_pinned: v0-fixture — synthetic card for schema/validator path only
moat: Each water placement permanently rewires adjacency so later light paths cannot reuse the first-session route.

loop_skeleton.description: Place a seed, water to rewrite tile adjacency, rotate the bed to re-aim light before wilt.

depth_mechanisms.name: adjacency rewrite
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Watering a tile swaps its edge set with a neighbor, changing legal light paths without adding tiles.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If players never plan water order, second-session clear rate equals first-session clear rate.

depth_mechanisms.name: wilt clock
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Unlit plants accumulate wilt; three wilt ticks remove the plant and refund no seed.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If wilt is removed, average solve time drops more than 30% on the same boards.

feel_signature: Short commits with irreversible adjacency edits; failure is a bed that cannot face the sun, not a health bar.
second_session_answer: Players return to re-route light through yesterday's water scars, not to grind higher numbers.
packaging_lessons: Ship one bed and three seed types before any shop or meta layer.
anti_lessons: Do not copy a skill tree or XP layer onto this loop — they hide adjacency mistakes.

system_bom.note: plant → water → rotate cycle is the only required loop
wilt extinction ends the run; no lives currency
bed adjacency must persist across sessions for second-session answer

citations.claim: This card is a synthetic fixture for the reference-card schema and validator.
